objective: Stratégie de Multi-factor sur ACTUSDC 30m. Indicateurs : ADX + BOLLINGER + ATR. Signal composite : ADX + BOLLINGER + ATR doivent tous confirmer la direction. Sortie progressive : réduction quand ADX diverge, clôture si BOLLINGER se retourne. Stop serré 1.4x ATR pour limiter le drawdown, TP à 4.1x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands, ATR and ADX provides a robust multi-factor strategy for trading ACTUSDC on the 30 minute timeframe. The use of these indicators together helps in confirming trend direction, reducing whipsaws, and setting stop loss at appropriate levels.
Combining ADX, Bollinger Bands and ATR can provide a robust signal for trend confirmation with the additional protection of stop loss at 1.5x ATR below entry and take profit at 3x ATR above entry.
Combining ADX, Bollinger Bands and ATR helps to identify strong trends with low volatility which results in better trade entries and exits.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy is aimed at identifying strong trends with low volatility by combining ADX, Bollinger Bands and ATR. It enters long when all three indicators confirm the trend, exits if the close crosses the middle Bollinger Band or ADX falls below 20, and uses a tight stop loss of 1.4x ATR to limit drawdown. If results are poor (negative return), changing the entry condition by adding RSI divergence could be tried; for mediocre performance (low Sharpe ratio), adjusting the exit conditions by using trailing stops or increasing the number of bars in each Bollinger Band may help improve returns. In case all else fails, a mean reversion strategy based on ATR could be considered.
